name: Saddle Pose
description: Kneel on the floor and sit between your heels with your legs folded by your sides. Slowly lean back as far as comfortable, supporting yourself with your hands behind you. If flexibility allows, lower onto your elbows or all the way down to the floor. Hold the position and breathe deeply. This deeply stretches the hip flexors, quads, and lower back. Also known as Reclined Hero Pose (Supta Virasana).
